Class ParameterRendererFactory

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool.param.ParameterRendererFactory
public class ParameterRendererFactory extends Object
A factory for creating specialized ParameterRenderer instances.

This factory maintains a static registry of value types and uses semantic probers to decide the best visual representation for a given tool parameter.

Representational Fidelity: This factory authoritatively prefers raw Java representation via TextUtils.resolveContentString(Object) over JSON for all parameter types to ensure human-readability in the UI.

Author:
anahata

  • Method Details

    • register

      public static void register(Class<?> type, Class<? extends ParameterRenderer<?>> rendererClass)
      Registers a specialized renderer class for a specific parameter value type.
      Parameters:
      type - The class of the value (e.g., FullTextFileCreate.class).
      rendererClass - The class of the renderer (e.g., FullTextFileCreateRenderer.class).

    • registerById

      public static void registerById(String id, Class<? extends ParameterRenderer<?>> rendererClass)
      Registers a specialized renderer class for a specific String ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The string ID (e.g., "java").
      rendererClass - The class of the renderer.

    • create

      public static ParameterRenderer<?> create(AgiPanel agiPanel, AbstractToolCall<?,?> call, String paramName, Object value, String rendererId)
      Unified creation logic for parameter renderers.

      High-Fidelity Strategy: This method attempts to resolve a specialized renderer from the registry, but authoritatively falls back to a ObjectToStringParameterRenderer for all other types.

      Semantic Bridge: It converts complex types (Enums, Arrays) to high-fidelity Strings before passing them to the code block renderer to prevent bridge-method ClassCastExceptions.

      Parameters:
      agiPanel - The parent agi panel.
      call - The tool call.
      paramName - The parameter name.
      value - The current value.
      rendererId - Optional renderer hint (e.g., "java", "json").
      Returns:
      A specialized or fallback renderer.
